subject: Receipt — Ironbound Plumbing Supply order #IPS-4471
snippet: Thanks Lisa — attached is your receipt for the fixture and rough-in order...
body:
Hi Lisa,

Attached is your receipt for the fixture and rough-in order. Balance of 1355.81 is on your account terms, net 30.

Thanks,
Ironbound Plumbing Supply

subject: Kitchen remodel — paid in full
snippet: Lisa, sent the last piece today, should be all squared up...
body:
Lisa,

Sent the last piece today, that should have us all squared up on the kitchen. Thanks again for the work.

Sandra

subject: Bathroom fixtures — deposit sent
snippet: Put a grand down on it, will get you the rest after the walkthrough...
body:
Lisa,

Put a grand down on it today. I will get you the rest after the walkthrough. Looks great so far.

Tony

subject: Tile job — partial payment
snippet: Sent 900 to hold my spot, rest when it wraps...
body:
Hi Lisa,

Sent 900 to hold my spot in the schedule. I will get you the rest when the tile wraps. Thanks.

Keisha
